hooks.command: bash -c 'tool=codex; roots=(); if [ -n "${CODEX_PLUGIN_ROOT:-}" ]; then roots+=("$CODEX_PLUGIN_ROOT"); fi; if [ -n "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT:-}" ]; then tool=claude; roots+=("$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT"); fi; for root in "$HOME"/.codex/plugins/cache/agent-pipeline/pipeline/* "$HOME"/.codex/plugins/cache/agent-pipeline/*/pipeline/* "$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null || pwd)"; do roots+=("$root"); done; for root in "${roots[@]}"; do script="$root/hooks/session-start.sh"; if [ -f "$script" ]; then exec bash "$script" "$tool"; fi; done; printf "{\"hookSpecificOutput\":{\"hookEventName\":\"SessionStart\",\"additionalContext\":\"agent-pipeline hook could not find hooks/session-start.sh. Reinstall the pipeline plugin or copy hooks/ into this repo.\"}}\n"'

bash -c 'tool=codex; roots=(); if [ -n "${CODEX_PLUGIN_ROOT:-}" ]; then roots+=("$CODEX_PLUGIN_ROOT"); fi; if [ -n "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT:-}" ]; then tool=claude; roots+=("$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT"); fi; for root in "$HOME"/.codex/plugins/cache/agent-pipeline/pipeline/* "$HOME"/.codex/plugins/cache/agent-pipeline/*/pipeline/* "$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null || pwd)"; do roots+=("$root"); done; for root in "${roots[@]}"; do script="$root/hooks/edit-streak.sh"; if [ -f "$script" ]; then exec bash "$script" "$tool"; fi; done'
